name: @amlhubs/semaf-time
description: ISO 24617-1:2012 (confirmed 2023) — Language resource management — Semantic annotation framework — Part 1: Time and events (SemAF-Time, ISO-TimeML). Extensible TypeScript metaclasses for the SemAF-Time annotation surface: Event (with EventClass: Reporting, Perception, Aspectual, I-Action, I-State, State, Occurrence), Time (TIMEX3 with normalized ISO 8601 value), Signal (temporal signal anchor), TLink (typed temporal relation following Allen interval algebra), SLink (subordinating link), ALink (aspectual link), MakeInstance, MeasureLink, and ConfidenceLink. Anchoring to source spans via offset Properties, cross-references via Associations. De-facto interchangeable with academic TimeML 1.2.1.
